steps.title: Identify the task requirement
steps.content: The task asks to contrast the subject matter of the two prints—what they depict or express (their content and theme), not the technique or date.

steps.title: Match to a subject matter contrast
steps.content: Choice D directly identifies what each print shows: Méndez's expresses a political point of view, Muafangejo's depicts an everyday scene. The other choices focus on technique (A, B) or dates (C) instead. This matches choice D — D is correct.
